ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the retailer */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the invoice */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount for the transaction */,
  "operating_profit" TEXT /* Operating profit for the transaction */,
  "operating_margin" TEXT /* Operating margin for the transaction */,
  "sales_method" TEXT /* Method of sale (e.g., In-store, Online) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sale */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employee */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment method */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the promotion */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status of the transaction (e.g., Not returned, Returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city of the customer */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city of the employee */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state of the employee */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee was hired */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "cost_price" TEXT /* Cost price of the product */,
  "retail_price" TEXT /* Retail price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage of the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the return */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales transaction */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Processing, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id")
)
